name: analytics-umami
description:
Umami — privacy-friendly, cookieless web analytics. Two options: (a) FREE Umami Cloud (10k events/mo on the hobby plan, no credit card) or (b) self-host on any Postgres instance. Adds a single tracking script tag to the root layout via fence-marker.

No PII collected — GDPR-friendly out of the box. After scaffold: create a website at https://cloud.umami.is and set NEXT_PUBLIC_UMAMI_WEBSITE_ID in .env.local.
